# Mark Siazon — GitHub Profile (@Iron-Mark)

> Product designer, full-stack developer, product engineer, UI/UX designer, front-end specialist, developer × designer, polymath / jack of all trades. Proof-backed products across AI, mobile, Web3, and client web.

## Identity

- Name: Mark Siazon
- GitHub: https://github.com/Iron-Mark
- Alt GitHub: https://github.com/mark-siazon
- Portfolio: https://www.marksiazon.dev
- Recruiter brief: https://www.marksiazon.dev/recruiter
- Contact form: https://www.marksiazon.dev/contact
- Email: marksiazon.dev@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mark-siazon/

## Roles & focus

Product Designer · Full-Stack Developer · Product Engineer · UI/UX Designer · Front-end Specialist · Developer × Designer · Polymath / Jack of All Trades

Stack breadth: web (React, Next.js, TypeScript), mobile (Flutter, Kotlin, Wear OS), AI workflows (agents, trust & safety, ML UX), Web3 (Stellar, Celo, Soroban), backend (Node, FastAPI, Supabase), design (Figma, systems, research-to-ship).

## Featured work

- HireProof — AI trust & safety: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/hireproof · https://hireproof.tech/portfolio
- Stellaroid Earn — Web3 credential proof: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/stellaroid-earn · https://stellaroid.tech

- LexInSight — AI legal compliance chat: https://lexinsights.vercel.app · https://github.com/Iron-Mark/Hackathon-LexInsights

- FlowFit — Wear OS health & sensors: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/flowfit
- PalengkePay — Stellar fintech PWA: https://www.marksiazon.dev/projects/palengkepay · https://palengke-pay.vercel.app
